About Me

Results-driven Computer Science Engineering student with hands-on experience in cybersecurity, creative design, and AI/ML. Proven leader across multiple university bodies — from Media Head to President of the campus Media House — with a track record of delivering high-impact events, visual campaigns, and digital communications.

Currently interning at MSD (Merck & Co., Inc.) as a Creative Designer, translating business requirements into compelling digital assets. Passionate about the intersection of technology, design, and storytelling, while pursuing creative and competitive interests through photography, music, football, and Formula 1, which inspire innovation, discipline, and continuous learning.

Internships

Present

MSD (Merck & Co., Inc.)

Dubai — Gulf marketing & digital communications team

Designed and shipped a production tool that converts raw agenda files (.docx, .xlsx, .csv, .txt) into fully branded, deployment-ready HTML emailers. Built the client-side file parsing pipeline with intelligent time-range detection, speaker extraction, and row normalisation, so messy real-world files need no manual cleanup. Added a real-time live preview with full typography and colour theming, pixel-level logo trimming via canvas manipulation, and banner overlay compositing. Also delivered campaigns across emailers, flyers, decks, and social graphics, keeping brand compliance consistent across all MSD Gulf communications.

MARKETING & COMMUNICATIONS
Jun — Aug 2024

Mashreq Bank

Dubai — security operations & infrastructure

Conducted vulnerability assessments across banking infrastructure and documented findings with remediation recommendations under the NIST CSF 2.0 framework. Contributed to automated security monitoring tooling used by the security operations team.

SECURITY OPERATIONS
Race results

Projects

2025 · Live

AI-Powered Emailer & Agenda Automation Platform

Marketing teams were manually reformatting agendas and rebuilding email templates for every event across five Gulf markets — hours of repetitive work per campaign. Built a full automation tool instead: upload a raw file in any format, and the system parses it, detects time ranges and speaker blocks, and generates a live-previewed, pixel-perfect branded emailer ready for Salesforce deployment. Campaign emailer production time went from hours to minutes, and it's in active use by the MSD Gulf marketing team.

2024

Chess Game Outcome Prediction

An ML pipeline predicting game outcomes from move sequences and player behavioural data — covering the full lifecycle from raw data ingestion and feature extraction from game notation through to model selection, evaluation, and visualisation.
